```diff
@@ -1,23 +1,652 @@
  "use client";
  
- import React, { useState } from "react";
+ import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
...
- import { LLMEvaluation } from "@/components/evaluations/LLMEvaluation";
...
- export default function LLMPage() {
-   const router = useRouter();
-   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
- 
-   return (
-     &lt;AppLayout
-       activeItem="llm"
-       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
-       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
-       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
-     &gt;
-       &lt;LLMEvaluation /&gt;
-     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
-   );
- }
- 
+ type TestData = {
+   uuid: string;
+   name: string;
+   description: string;
+   config: Record&lt;string, any&gt;;
+   created_at: string;
+   updated_at: string;
+ };
+ 
+ export default function LLMPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+   const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
+   const [addTestSidebarOpen, setAddTestSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
+   const [newTestName, setNewTestName] = useState("");
+   const [newTestDescription, setNewTestDescription] = useState("");
+   const [tests, setTests] = useState&lt;TestData[]&gt;([]);
+   const [testsLoading, setTestsLoading] = useState(true);
+   const [testsError, setTestsError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);
+   const [createError, setCreateError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [editingTestUuid, setEditingTestUuid] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [isLoadingTest, setIsLoadingTest] = useState(false);
+   const [validationAttempted, setValidationAttempted] = useState(false);
+ 
+   // Fetch tests from backend
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchTests = async () =&gt; {
+       try {
+         setTestsLoading(true);
+         setTestsError(null);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests&#96;, {
+           method: "GET",
+           headers: {
+             accept: "application/json",
+             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+           },
+         });
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           throw new Error("Failed to fetch tests");
+         }
+ 
+         const data: TestData[] = await response.json();
+         setTests(data);
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching tests:", err);
+         setTestsError(
+           err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load tests"
+         );
+       } finally {
+         setTestsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     fetchTests();
+   }, []);
+ 
+   // Delete test from backend
+   const deleteTest = async (uuid: string) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+       }
+ 
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests/${uuid}&#96;, {
+         method: "DELETE",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+       });
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to delete test");
+       }
+ 
+       // Remove the test from local state
+       setTests(tests.filter((test) =&gt; test.uuid !== uuid));
+     } catch (err) {
+       console.error("Error deleting test:", err);
+       alert(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to delete test");
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   // Create test via POST API
+   const createTest = async () =&gt; {
+     setValidationAttempted(true);
+     if (!newTestName.trim() || !newTestDescription.trim()) return;
+ 
+     try {
+       setIsCreating(true);
+       setCreateError(null);
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+       }
+ 
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests&#96;, {
+         method: "POST",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "Content-Type": "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+         body: JSON.stringify({
+           name: newTestName.trim(),
+           description: newTestDescription.trim(),
+           config: {
+             description: newTestDescription.trim(),
+           },
+         }),
+       });
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to create test");
+       }
+ 
+       // Refetch the tests list to get the updated data
+       const testsResponse = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests&#96;, {
+         method: "GET",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+       });
+ 
+       if (testsResponse.ok) {
+         const updatedTests: TestData[] = await testsResponse.json();
+         setTests(updatedTests);
+       }
+ 
+       // Reset form fields
+       setNewTestName("");
+       setNewTestDescription("");
+ 
+       // Close the sidebar
+       setAddTestSidebarOpen(false);
+     } catch (err) {
+       console.error("Error creating test:", err);
+       setCreateError(
+         err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to create test"
+       );
+     } finally {
+       setIsCreating(false);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   // Fetch test details by UUID and open edit sidebar
+   const openEditTest = async (uuid: string) =&gt; {
+     try {
+       setIsLoadingTest(true);
+       setEditingTestUuid(uuid);
+       setAddTestSidebarOpen(true);
+       setCreateError(null);
+ 
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+       }
+ 
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests/${uuid}&#96;, {
+         method: "GET",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+       });
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to fetch test details");
+       }
+ 
+       const testData: TestData = await response.json();
+ 
+       // Populate form fields with test data
+       setNewTestName(testData.name || "");
+       setNewTestDescription(testData.config?.description || testData.description || "");
+     } catch (err) {
+       console.error("Error fetching test:", err);
+       setCreateError(
+         err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load test"
+       );
+     } finally {
+       setIsLoadingTest(false);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   // Update existing test via PUT API
+   const updateTest = async () =&gt; {
+     setValidationAttempted(true);
+     if (!newTestName.trim() || !newTestDescription.trim() || !editingTestUuid)
+       return;
+ 
+     try {
+       setIsCreating(true);
+       setCreateError(null);
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+       }
+ 
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests/${editingTestUuid}&#96;, {
+         method: "PUT",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "Content-Type": "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+         body: JSON.stringify({
+           name: newTestName.trim(),
+           description: newTestDescription.trim(),
+           config: {
+             description: newTestDescription.trim(),
+           },
+         }),
+       });
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to update test");
+       }
+ 
+       // Refetch the tests list to get the updated data
+       const testsResponse = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests&#96;, {
+         method: "GET",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+       });
+ 
+       if (testsResponse.ok) {
+         const updatedTests: TestData[] = await testsResponse.json();
+         setTests(updatedTests);
+       }
+ 
+       // Reset and close
+       resetForm();
+       setAddTestSidebarOpen(false);
+     } catch (err) {
+       console.error("Error updating test:", err);
+       setCreateError(
+         err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to update test"
+       );
+     } finally {
+       setIsCreating(false);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   // Reset form fields
+   const resetForm = () =&gt; {
+     setNewTestName("");
+     setNewTestDescription("");
+     setEditingTestUuid(null);
+     setCreateError(null);
+     setValidationAttempted(false);
+   };
+ 
+   // Filter tests based on search query
+   const filteredTests = tests.filter(
+     (test) =&gt;
+       (test.name &amp;&amp;
+         test.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) ||
+       (test.description &amp;&amp;
+         test.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) ||
+       (test.config?.description &amp;&amp;
+         test.config.description
+           .toLowerCase()
+           .includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
+   );
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="llm"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+         {/* Header */}
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold"&gt;Tests&lt;/h1&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground text-base leading-relaxed mt-1"&gt;
+               Create and manage tests to evaluate your language models.
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={() =&gt; {
+               resetForm();
+               setAddTestSidebarOpen(true);
+             }}
+             className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             Add test
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Search Input */}
+         &lt;div className="relative max-w-md"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 flex items-center pl-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth={2}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                 d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 105.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0010.607 10.607z"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;input
+             type="text"
+             value={searchQuery}
+             onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+             placeholder="Search tests"
+             className="w-full h-10 pl-10 pr-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Tests List / Loading / Error / Empty State */}
+         {testsLoading ? (
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-8"&gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;circle
+                 className="opacity-25"
+                 cx="12"
+                 cy="12"
+                 r="10"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth="4"
+               &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 className="opacity-75"
+                 fill="currentColor"
+                 d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+               &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : testsError ? (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{testsError}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+               className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Retry
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : filteredTests.length === 0 ? (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-muted flex items-center justify-center mb-4"&gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-7 h-7 text-muted-foreground"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth={1.5}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   strokeLinecap="round"
+                   strokeLinejoin="round"
+                   d="M9 12h3.75M9 15h3.75M9 18h3.75m3 .75H18a2.25 2.25 0 002.25-2.25V6.108c0-1.135-.845-2.098-1.976-2.192a48.424 48.424 0 00-1.123-.08m-5.801 0c-.065.21-.1.433-.1.664 0 .414.336.75.75.75h4.5a.75.75 0 00.75-.75 2.25 2.25 0 00-.1-.664m-5.8 0A2.251 2.251 0 0113.5 2.25H15c1.012 0 1.867.668 2.15 1.586m-5.8 0c-.376.023-.75.05-1.124.08C9.095 4.01 8.25 4.973 8.25 6.108V8.25m0 0H4.875c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h9.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V9.375c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H8.25zM6.75 12h.008v.008H6.75V12zm0 3h.008v.008H6.75V15zm0 3h.008v.008H6.75V18z"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+               No tests found
+             &lt;/h3&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4"&gt;
+               {searchQuery
+                 ? "No tests match your search"
+                 : "You haven't created any tests yet"}
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; {
+                 resetForm();
+                 setAddTestSidebarOpen(true);
+               }}
+               className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Add test
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+             {/* Table Header */}
+             &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/30"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 Name
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 Description
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="w-10"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;

+             {filteredTests.map((test) =&gt; (
+               &lt;div
+                 key={test.uuid}
+                 onClick={() =&gt; openEditTest(test.uuid)}
+                 className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-4 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer items-center"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;div className="min-w-0"&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-base font-medium text-foreground truncate"&gt;
+                     {test.name}
+                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                   {test.config?.description || test.description || "—"}
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={(e) =&gt; {
+                     e.stopPropagation();
+                     if (
+                       confirm(&#96;Are you sure you want to delete "${test.name}"?&#96;)
+                     ) {
+                       deleteTest(test.uuid);
+                     }
+                   }}

+

+       {addTestSidebarOpen &amp;&amp; (

+           {/* Backdrop */}
+           &lt;div
+             className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50"
+             onClick={() =&gt; {
+               resetForm();
+               setAddTestSidebarOpen(false);
+             }}
+           /&gt;
+           {/* Sidebar */}
+           &lt;div className="relative w-full max-w-xl bg-background border-l border-border flex flex-col h-full shadow-2xl"&gt;
+             {/* Header */}
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b border-border"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={1.5}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M9 12h3.75M9 15h3.75M9 18h3.75m3 .75H18a2.25 2.25 0 002.25-2.25V6.108c0-1.135-.845-2.098-1.976-2.192a48.424 48.424 0 00-1.123-.08m-5.801 0c-.065.21-.1.433-.1.664 0 .414.336.75.75.75h4.5a.75.75 0 00.75-.75 2.25 2.25 0 00-.1-.664m-5.8 0A2.251 2.251 0 0113.5 2.25H15c1.012 0 1.867.668 2.15 1.586m-5.8 0c-.376.023-.75.05-1.124.08C9.095 4.01 8.25 4.973 8.25 6.108V8.25m0 0H4.875c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h9.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V9.375c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H8.25zM6.75 12h.008v.008H6.75V12zm0 3h.008v.008H6.75V15zm0 3h.008v.008H6.75V18z"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-semibold"&gt;
+                   {editingTestUuid ? "Edit test" : "Add test"}
+                 &lt;/h2&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {
+                   resetForm();
+                   setAddTestSidebarOpen(false);
+                 }}
+                 className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Content */}
+             &lt;div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-6"&gt;
+               {isLoadingTest ? (
+                 &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;circle
+                       className="opacity-25"
+                       cx="12"
+                       cy="12"
+                       r="10"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth="4"
+                     &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       className="opacity-75"
+                       fill="currentColor"
+                       d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                     &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : (
+                 &lt;&gt;
+                   {/* Configuration Section */}
+                   &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-5 space-y-5 bg-muted/30"&gt;
+                     &lt;div&gt;
+                       &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium mb-1"&gt;
+                         Configuration
+                       &lt;/h3&gt;
+                       &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                         Configure your test details and parameters
+                       &lt;/p&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                     {/* Name */}
+                     &lt;div&gt;
+                       &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+                         Name &lt;span className="text-red-500"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;/label&gt;
+                       &lt;input
+                         type="text"
+                         value={newTestName}
+                         onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewTestName(e.target.value)}
+                         className={&#96;w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent ${
+                           validationAttempted &amp;&amp; !newTestName.trim()
+                             ? "border-red-500"
+                             : "border-border"
+                         }&#96;}
+                       /&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                     {/* Description */}
+                     &lt;div&gt;
+                       &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+                         Description &lt;span className="text-red-500"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;/label&gt;
+                       &lt;textarea
+                         value={newTestDescription}
+                         onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewTestDescription(e.target.value)}
+                         rows={3}
+                         className={&#96;w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-md text-base border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent resize-none ${
+                           validationAttempted &amp;&amp; !newTestDescription.trim()
+                             ? "border-red-500"
+                             : "border-border"
+                         }&#96;}
+                       /&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/&gt;
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Footer */}
+             &lt;div className="px-6 py-4 border-t border-border space-y-3"&gt;
+               {createError &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;p className="text-sm text-red-500"&gt;{createError}&lt;/p&gt;
+               )}
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; {
+                     resetForm();
+                     setAddTestSidebarOpen(false);
+                   }}
+                   disabled={isCreating || isLoadingTest}
+                   className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
+                 &gt;
+                   Cancel
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={editingTestUuid ? updateTest : createTest}
+                   disabled={isCreating || isLoadingTest}
+                   className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-white text-gray-900 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+                 &gt;
+                   {isCreating ? (
+                     &lt;&gt;
+                       &lt;svg
+                         className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                         fill="none"
+                         viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;circle
+                           className="opacity-25"
+                           cx="12"
+                           cy="12"
+                           r="10"
+                           stroke="currentColor"
+                           strokeWidth="4"
+                         &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                         &lt;path
+                           className="opacity-75"
+                           fill="currentColor"
+                           d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                         &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                       &lt;/svg&gt;
+                       {editingTestUuid ? "Saving..." : "Creating..."}
+                     &lt;/&gt;
+                   ) : editingTestUuid ? (
+                     "Save"
+                   ) : (
+                     "Add test"
+                   )}
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

---

I've updated the Tests tab (`/llm` page) to have a similar UI as the Tools tab. The changes include:

1. **Header** - "Tests" title with description and an "Add test" button
2. **Search input** - Filter tests by name or description  
3. **Tests table** - Shows existing tests with columns for Name, Description, and a delete action
4. **Loading/Error/Empty states** - Proper handling for all states
5. **Add/Edit sidebar** - A slide-out panel for creating or editing tests with name and description fields

The page now uses the same design patterns as the Tools page, including:
- Same table structure with clickable rows to edit
- Same button styling and positioning
- Same sidebar pattern for create/edit operations
- Same search functionality
- API calls to `/tests` endpoint for CRUD operations
